# Asset Deployment Diagnostic

## Never Deployed (6)
- [texture] era:story:0 (budget: 0)
- [texture] era:story:1 (budget: 0)
- [texture] era:story:2 (budget: 0)
- [texture] era:story:3 (budget: 0)
- [texture] reveal:story:0 (budget: 1)
- [obligation] break_moment:story:full (budget: 1)

## Over-Deployed (12)
- voice:Eleanor Voss:manner_0: deployed 9x against budget 3
- voice:Eleanor Voss:manner_1: deployed 9x against budget 3
- voice:Eleanor Voss:conflict: deployed 9x against budget 2
- voice:Dr. Mallory Finch:manner_0: deployed 6x against budget 3

- voice:Beatrice Quill:manner_0: deployed 5x against budget 3

- voice:Beatrice Quill:conflict: deployed 5x against budget 2

## Deployment by Scope
- character: 78 deployments
